news.title: Echoes of Life audiobook is in progress
news.body: The audiobook edition of Echoes of Life: The End of Humanity is currently in progress. More details to come soon.

news.title: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower is being queried to literary agents
news.body: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower is currently being queried to literary agents as I seek traditional publishing for the picture book.
